title: Byju's is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Byju's is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Subject Matter Expert looking for your next big career move? Byju's in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Byju's:
Byju's is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Byju's!
